series_metadata.series_title: Software Licenses and Product Authorization Keys
series_metadata.series_description: Software licenses and product authorization keys that grant the Ohio Turnpike and Infrastructure Commission permission to use one or more copies of a manufacturer''s copyrighted software.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: licenses become obsolete, software is no longer used, replaced with updated or new licenses, and ; Electronic: licenses become obsolete, software is no longer used, replaced with updated or new licenses, and
